comments: Approved from direct evidence. Commit 39f5c32 changes exactly: templates/workflows/custom-deploy-pipeline.yaml, documentation/EN/TEAM_COLLABORATION.md, documentation/ZH/TEAM_COLLABORATION.md, tasks/v0.8-m5-execution-result.json, and tasks/v0.8-m5-result-review-packet.json. The workflow file was created and contains mixed ai_execution and bash nodes (analyze_deployment_risk, qa_sign_off, build_project, deploy_to_staging). Both TEAM_COLLABORATION documents were updated to formalize the Team Mode Git Dual-Tiered Synchronization / Agent Sync protocol, including the pull-model claiming mechanism via executor assignment on the agent-sync branch. No evidence of realtime WebSocket/Database sync implementation, no M6 legacy Python tooling deprecation work, and no changes to workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json semantics appear in the commit. The execution result artifact matches the reviewed implementation and artifact list.
